input.content:
name: environment-matrix-generator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: 'Fixture file under fixtures/ to generate a matrix from'
        required: false
        default: 'basic.json'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  # The harness writes the desired fixture name into ACTIVE_FIXTURE before
  # invoking `act`. Default to basic.json so push triggers also exercise it.
  ACTIVE_FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'basic.json' }}

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Error "Pester reported $($result.FailedCount) failing tests"
            exit 1
          }

  generate:
    name: Generate matrix from fixture
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate matrix
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          FIXTURE: ${{ env.ACTIVE_FIXTURE }}
        run: |
          $fixture = Join-Path 'fixtures' $env:FIXTURE
          if (-not (Test-Path $fixture)) {
            Write-Error "Fixture not found: $fixture"
            exit 1
          }
          . ./MatrixGenerator.ps1
          $json = Invoke-MatrixGeneration -ConfigPath $fixture
          Write-Host '----BEGIN MATRIX JSON----'
          Write-Host $json
          Write-Host '----END MATRIX JSON----'

name: environment-matrix-generator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: 'Fixture file under fixtures/ to generate a matrix from'
        required: false
        default: 'basic.json'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Error "Pester reported $($result.FailedCount) failing tests"
            exit 1
          }

  generate:
    name: Generate matrix from fixture
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate matrix
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          FIXTURE: ${{ env.ACTIVE_FIXTURE }}
        run: |
          $fixture = Join-Path 'fixtures' $env:FIXTURE
          if (-not (Test-Path $fixture)) {
            Write-Error "Fixture not found: $fixture"
            exit 1
          }
          . ./MatrixGenerator.ps1
          $json = Invoke-MatrixGeneration -ConfigPath $fixture
          Write-Host '----BEGIN MATRIX JSON----'
          Write-Host $json
          Write-Host '----END MATRIX JSON----'

content.text:
All 23 Pester tests pass and the harness ran all 3 fixtures end-to-end through `act push --rm` with exact-value assertions on the parsed matrix JSON.

**Files created:**
- `MatrixGenerator.ps1` — `New-BuildMatrix` (axis cartesian product, GHA-style include/exclude, max-parallel/fail-fast, max-size validation) + `Invoke-MatrixGeneration` CLI
- `MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1` — 13 unit tests (TDD red→green, written before the implementation)
- `Workflow.Tests.ps1` — 10 structural/actionlint tests for the workflow
- `.github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml` — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch triggers, `contents: read`, two jobs (`test` runs Pester, `generate` needs `test`, runs the script on a fixture chosen via `ACTIVE_FIXTURE` env or `fixture` input), `shell: pwsh`, `actions/checkout@v4`
- `fixtures/{basic,simple,flags}.json` — three test inputs
- `test-harness.ps1` — orchestrates 3 `act push --rm` runs (one per fixture, `--env ACTIVE_FIXTURE=…`), appends each run's output to `act-result.txt`, asserts exit 0, ≥2 "Job succeeded" lines, and parses the BEGIN/END-marker matrix JSON to compare against expected entries set-wise
- `.actrc` — `--pull=false --action-offline-mode` so the local image isn't re-pulled
- `act-result.txt` — required artifact, 530 lines covering all 3 cases

**Result:** actionlint clean, 23/23 Pester tests pass, harness reports `PASS basic / PASS simple / PASS flags`. Total `act push` runs used: 3 of 3 budget (one initial round failed at docker-pull due to `.actrc` missing `--pull=false`, fixed once, second round all green).

result:
All 23 Pester tests pass and the harness ran all 3 fixtures end-to-end through `act push --rm` with exact-value assertions on the parsed matrix JSON.

**Files created:**
- `MatrixGenerator.ps1` — `New-BuildMatrix` (axis cartesian product, GHA-style include/exclude, max-parallel/fail-fast, max-size validation) + `Invoke-MatrixGeneration` CLI
- `MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1` — 13 unit tests (TDD red→green, written before the implementation)
- `Workflow.Tests.ps1` — 10 structural/actionlint tests for the workflow
- `.github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml` — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch triggers, `contents: read`, two jobs (`test` runs Pester, `generate` needs `test`, runs the script on a fixture chosen via `ACTIVE_FIXTURE` env or `fixture` input), `shell: pwsh`, `actions/checkout@v4`
- `fixtures/{basic,simple,flags}.json` — three test inputs
- `test-harness.ps1` — orchestrates 3 `act push --rm` runs (one per fixture, `--env ACTIVE_FIXTURE=…`), appends each run's output to `act-result.txt`, asserts exit 0, ≥2 "Job succeeded" lines, and parses the BEGIN/END-marker matrix JSON to compare against expected entries set-wise
- `.actrc` — `--pull=false --action-offline-mode` so the local image isn't re-pulled
- `act-result.txt` — required artifact, 530 lines covering all 3 cases

**Result:** actionlint clean, 23/23 Pester tests pass, harness reports `PASS basic / PASS simple / PASS flags`. Total `act push` runs used: 3 of 3 budget (one initial round failed at docker-pull due to `.actrc` missing `--pull=false`, fixed once, second round all green).
